heading: Determination of ownership of claims referred by district courts of the United States
label: 1643l Determination of ownership of claims referred by district courts of the United States
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter and only for purposes of , a United State district court, for fact-finding purposes, may refer to the Commission, and the Commission may determine, questions of the amount and ownership of a claim by a United States national (as defined in ), resulting from the confiscation of property by the Government of Cuba described in , whether or not the United States national qualified as a national of the United States (as defined in ) at the time of the action by the Government of Cuba.section 6082 of this title1section 6023 of this titlesection 1643b(a) of this titlesection 1643a(1) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “States”.1
notes: Effective DateSection effective , or date determined pursuant to suspension authority of President, see .Aug. 1, 1996section 6085 of this title
